title: Desmond Mullins' Buzzer-Beating 3-Pointer Sends UConn to Final Four in Thrilling 73-72 Upset Over Duke
body:
In a heart-stopping, thrilling conclusion to the East Region semifinal matchup, UConn freshman Braylon Mullins sank a desperation 35-foot three-pointer with only 0.4 seconds remaining on the clock, giving the Huskies an astonishing 73-72 victory over top-seeded Duke and securing a spot in the Final Four. The improbable shot, which will undoubtedly be etched in the memories of basketball fans for years to come, came on the heels of a stunning rally by UConn, who overcame a 19-point first-half deficit to stun the heavily favored Blue Devils.

The incredible turn of events was set in motion when Mullins retrieved a loose ball near midcourt, turning a seemingly insurmountable situation into a glimmer of hope for the Huskies. With time running out, UConn coach Dan Hurley wisely opted to call a timeout, allowing his team to regroup and devise a plan of attack. In the end, it came down to a single shot, and Mullins delivered, draining the game-winning three-pointer from nearly 35 feet out to send the UConn faithful into a frenzy.

UConn's improbable comeback will be remembered for its sheer scope: down 19 points with just over 12 minutes remaining in the first half, the Huskies staged a remarkable turnaround, outscoring Duke 53-37 over the final 20 minutes of play. The Blue Devils, who had been widely expected to make a deep run in the tournament, were left stunned and reeling by the loss. "It's an incredible feeling," Mullins said in the aftermath, "but we can't let it get to our heads. We've still got a lot of work to do."

The stunning upset has sent shockwaves through the college basketball world, with many pundits questioning whether UConn's improbable victory was a fluke or a harbinger of things to come. While it's impossible to predict the future with certainty, one thing is clear: the Huskies have earned their place in the Final Four, and they will be a force to be reckoned with in the semifinals. With Mullins emerging as a breakout star, UConn will look to build on this momentum and make a deep run in the tournament.

As the Huskies prepare to face their next opponent, they'll do so with a renewed sense of confidence and a growing reputation as one of the most resilient teams in the country. While the road to the championship will undoubtedly be fraught with challenges, UConn's improbable victory over Duke has shown that they have the mettle to compete with the best of the best. With the Final Four just on the horizon, the Huskies will look to continue their remarkable run and make a lasting impression on the basketball world.

In the end, the improbable victory over Duke serves as a testament to the enduring power of college basketball: a game that can produce moments of breathtaking brilliance, where the impossible can become possible in the blink of an eye. As the Huskies look to build on this momentum, they'll do so with a renewed sense of purpose and a growing understanding of what it takes to succeed at the highest level. With the Final Four on the line, UConn will look to continue their remarkable run and make a lasting impression on the basketball world.
